sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27707" key="dixofrone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐχο-φρονέω</orth>, <sense id="n27707.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to hold different opinions,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">763e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
